verse_text: Watch therefore, for you do not know when the master of the house is coming-in the evening, at midnight, at the crowing of the rooster, or in the morning-

links.context: God had prepared the people: Christ warns His followers to watch, for you do not know when the master of the house is coming--lest coming suddenly, he find you sleeping ([[MRK.13:35]], [[MRK.13:36]]; see also [[MAL.3:1]]).
